post.html:
If its not a priority queue, its a trie

They are pronounced like Tree. So its a Tree trie! These happen SO frequently in interviews, its outstanding! For the sake of being practical, lets go over them.















The trie

The easiest way to visualize a trie is to think of auto-complete. Lets go over it on the whiteboard!















Lets implement one!

This should be a relatively easy implementation!
post.title: Tries
